title: Fiery Smoked Brazilian Chicken Skewers
description: This dish features smoked chicken breast, marinated in a mixture of ground cumin, shio cure, and chili flakes, served on skewers with a side of low glycemic index vegetables.

ingredients.name: bell peppers
ingredients.notes: any color, cut into 1 inch pieces

instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together ground cumin, shio cure, chili flakes, and a pinch of salt.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken, bell peppers, onions, and zucchini onto skewers.
Brush the skewers with coconut oil and season with salt.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh cilantro and a side of low glycemic index vegetables.
